MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Freedman for Randall Dow (Administrator).
Marlene Getchell and Helene Wenzel for Joseph Viglizzo.

The Court noted that the Parties now have a settlement agreement which resolves the issues that were in dispute and that nobody is objecting. Ms. Getchell stated that there are no objections. Mr. Freedman provided a revised order. The Court granted the First and Final Report on Waiver of Account, etc. (subject to review of the revised order).
